headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -72.3)
key_insights: Frustrations trending down 4% over 7 days (weak momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 117 quotes and an overwhelming 96 at strong intensity - people are expressing serious anger and dissatisfaction today.

• At 67.5, frustration levels are well above typical but still within the normal range for this period.

• Both fears and optimism dropped significantly from yesterday, with optimism falling from positive to notably negative territory.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
